name: Anolisa Memory
description: Persistent memory backed by the agent-memory MCP server with namespace isolation and openat2 sandbox. Provides BM25 search, file read/write, observe, and context assembly tools.

binaryPath.description: Path to the agent-memory binary. Default: auto-detect from PATH or known install locations.

userId.description: Namespace user_id for the memory mount. Default: auto-detect from OS uid. Must not contain '..', '/', '\' or control characters (validated against the Rust side).

profile.description: Memory profile controlling which tools are visible to the agent.

maxReadBytes.description: Maximum bytes for a single mem_read call. Default: 1048576 (1 MiB). Hard cap: 4 GiB.

maxWriteBytes.description: Maximum bytes for a single mem_write call. Default: 16777216 (16 MiB). Hard cap: 4 GiB.

binaryPath.label: Agent Memory Binary
binaryPath.help: Absolute path to the agent-memory binary. Leave empty to auto-detect from PATH.

userId.label: Namespace User ID
userId.help: User identifier for the memory namespace. Defaults to the OS user uid.

profile.label: Memory Profile
profile.help: Controls which tools are advertised: basic (structured API only), advanced (file + search), expert (file tools only).

maxReadBytes.label: Max Read Bytes
maxReadBytes.help: Maximum bytes returned by a single read call. Prevents multi-GB blobs from exhausting memory.

maxWriteBytes.label: Max Write Bytes
maxWriteBytes.help: Maximum bytes accepted by a single write call. Caps disk and buffer growth.
